claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 committed to a no-deforestation, no-peat, no-exploitation (NDPE) land use policy.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 committed to a no-deforestation, no-peat, no-exploitation (NDPE) land use policy.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 improved supply chain traceability with RSPO-certified and audited suppliers.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 improved supply chain traceability with RSPO-certified and audited suppliers.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 reduced Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emissions intensity.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 reduced Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emissions intensity.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 lowered water intensity through recycled water initiatives.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 lowered water intensity through recycled water initiatives.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 upheld food safety and product quality standards.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 upheld food safety and product quality standards.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 protected worker safety and labour rights across operations.

claims.text: In FY2023, Agricultural ASEAN 29 strengthened its anti-corruption code of conduct and board ethics oversight.
